sourceMovie.title: Emilia Pérez
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Emilia Pérez (2024) as a drama theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The drama and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Jackie Brown
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Emilia Pérez clicked for you, Jackie Brown (1997) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Emilia Pérez?
faq.answer: Try Jackie Brown, Man on Fire, Donnie Brasco—each shares DNA with Emilia Pérez while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Emilia Pérez?
faq.answer: Emilia Pérez (2024) is best described as Drama, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Emilia Pérez worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
